title: Fix incorrect input sampling of clocking block signals
body:
Previously, default input sampling was not triggered on the same event as the clocking block, which caused the clockvar to be updated unexpectedly. Now input sampling is sensitive to the event specified in the clocking block declaration.

Regarding the region in which the clockvar should be updated in this case, the IEEE does not seem to specify it clearly, but the note in `14.4` indicates that it should be done in the same region as the event controls.
